description: All Work Breakdown Structure codes for a given project

parameters.name: can_select_divisions
parameters.description: If true, will include WBS Codes with division segment items. Default is true.

parameters.name: filters[status][]
parameters.description: Filter results to only return codes with the included statuses. Options are 'active' or 'inactive'. Defaults to returning all results.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description: Filter results to only return codes that were updated within the range of the two specified ISO 8601 timestamps separated by the ... delimiter.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter results to only return codes that match the specified WBS scope.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Searches the WBS code and description values and returns results sorted in descending order of relevance to the search query.

parameters.name: group_type
parameters.description: Along with 'group_id', groups WBS codes by the specified group type and group ID. Only supported option is 'contract'.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Along with 'group_type', groups WBS codes by the specified group type and group ID. Only supported option is a contract ID.

parameters.name: hide_not_in_group
parameters.description: If true, will hide WBS codes that are not in the specified 'group_type' and 'group_id'. Default is true. If false, WBS codes in the specified group will be returned first followed by WBS codes not ...

id.description: Unique identifier of the Work Breakdown Structure code.

flat_code.description: The Work Breakdown Structure code made up of segment values, concatenated by the set delimiter

flat_name.description: The names of the Work Breakdown Structure segments concatenated by the specified with the company's delimiter and WBS pattern

description.description: The description of the Work Breakdown Structure code

status.description: The status of the WBS Code

wbs_pattern_id.description: The ID of the WBS Pattern used for a Work Breakdown Structure code
